name: Scrape any URL without getting blocked using Firecrawl
description: Scrapes one or more URLs using Firecrawl (which handles anti-bot technologies), extracts and analyzes the content with Claude AI, saves results to Google Sheets, and notifies Slack with a summary.

source.originalName: Scrape every URL on the web without getting blocked by Anti-Bot technologies with Scrappey

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving results

urls.description: Comma-separated list of URLs to scrape (e.g. 'https://example.com,https://other.com')

extractionGoal.default: Extract all key information, data, and structured content
extractionGoal.description: What to extract from the scraped pages

steps.name: Analyze scraped content with Claude AI
Save scraping results to Google Sheets
